mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_partner_safety_execution (plan_id, name, company_code, phone, system_code, system_uid, called_at, execution_token, signature, checklist_template_id, checklist_data, completed, completed_at, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{name}, #{companyCode}, #{phone,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{systemCode}, #{systemUid}, #{calledAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{executionToken}, #{signature,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{checklistTemplateId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{checklistData,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{completed}0, #{completedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_partner_safety_execution SET name = #{name}, company_code = #{companyCode}, phone = #{phone,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, system_code = #{systemCode}, system_uid = #{systemUid}, called_at = #{calledAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, signature = #{signature,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, checklist_template_id = #{checklistTemplateId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, checklist_data = #{checklistData,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, completed = #{completed}0, completed_at = #{completedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_partner_safety_execution WHERE completed = 1 ORDER BY completed_at DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_partner_safety_execution ORDER BY created_at DESC
